name: Tech Discovery Mode
description: Find Useful Curiosity patterns around AI tools, gadgets, apps, automation, useful websites, productivity tools, mobile accessories, and desk setup tools.
search_focus: modern tech tools that solve a visible problem
short demos with a practical payoff

safety_rules.description: Analyze only the pattern; do not download or copy source video.
Do not claim tool performance, income, or outcomes that are not verified.
Remake ideas must use original screen recordings, licensed visuals, or owned assets.

curiosity_score.description: How strongly the hook makes viewers want to see the tool or solution.

usefulness_score.description: How clearly the tool solves a real productivity, workflow, or device problem.

originality_potential.description: How easily RAIZ can create a new original demo without copying source assets.

affiliate_potential.description: How naturally the format can support truthful product or category recommendations.

production_difficulty.description: How hard it is to produce original footage, screen capture, or demonstrations.

rights_risk.description: How likely the idea depends on copyrighted footage, brand misuse, or creator imitation.

brand_fit.description: How well the idea fits RAIZ useful, premium, practical content.

remake_safety.description: How safely the idea can be remade without copying, scraping, or unsafe claims.

disallowed_patterns: copying product page media without permission
